Thursday 4 December 2025 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the New Zealand Antarctic Institute

Submitter list:

New Zealand Antarctic Institute

Jordy Hendrikx, Chief Executive Officer
Leon Grice, Board Chair


2024/25 Annual review of the New Zealand Customs Service; 2024/25 Annual review of the Border Executive Board

Submitter list:

Hon Casey Costello - Minister of Customs

New Zealand Customs Service and Border Executive Board

Christine Stevenson, Chief Executive and Comptroller of Customs
Jamie Bamford, Deputy Chief Executive Operations

Joe Cannon, Deputy Chief Executive International and Governance

David Soper, Chief Legal Advisor
